LOOKING TO VISIT OUR TAPROOM? GOOD CHOICE
WEST MIDTOWN
1279 Seaboard Industrial Blvd NW, Atlanta, GA  30318
Round Trip - West Midtown is  located where Collier Rd meets Chattahoochee Ave. Turn down Seaboard Industrial and drive towards the end of the street until you see us on the right.
Tuesday-Thursday 4:30-9pm  |  Friday 3-10pm  |  Saturday 12-10pm  | Sunday 12:30-8pm | Monday Closed
EAST COBB
4475 Roswell Road, Suite 1600, Marietta, GA 30062
Round Trip - East Cobb is located in Avenue East Cobb near the intersection of Roswell Rd and Johnson's Ferry Rd. Once in Avenue East Cobb, find Round Trip in the inner 'horseshoe' in the back. We are adjacent to the central plaza.
Monday-Thursday 12pm-9pm  |  Friday 12-10pm  |  Saturday 11am-10pm  |  Sunday 12-8pm
FAQs
Fifth Anniversary Party | 31 January 2026
7 January 2026
On Saturday, 31 January, we celebrate our fifth revolution around this local star with a universe of beer, food, and celestial illuminations. Our gaze extends to the cosmos as we unveil the interstellar Fifth Orbit, a Rye Lager aged on Amburana wood, which represents a singular journey through five distinct dimensions of brewing mastery, where…
Read More
about Fifth Anniversary Party | 31 January 2026
OKTOBERFEST 2025
4 August 2025
Wilkommen to Round Trip’s annual Oktoberfest celebration! This year, we’re transforming our taproom into a lively Bavarian beer hall to celebrate the world’s largest folk festival. We have two festive weekends lined up, with a different taproom hosting each weekend. Alongside our award-winning Oktoberfest Märzen, we’re releasing Oak-Aged Oktoberfest, and tapping an Oktoberfest firkin each…
Read More
about OKTOBERFEST 2025
Fourth Anniversary Party | 15 February 2025
14 January 2025
On Saturday, 15 February, we celebrate our fourth revolution around this local star with a universe of beer, food, and entertainment. Our gaze extends to the cosmos as we unveil three celestial beers: the dark expanse of Fourth Orbit Coffee Baltic Porter, the nighttime journey of Midnight Cab Black Saison, the hoppy signal of…

--- Page: /about ---
About - Round Trip Brewing Co.
Skip to content
ABOUT ROUND TRIP BREWING CO.
Round Trip Brewing Co. crafts typical and üntypical German-style beer for our community of neighbors and explorers in pursuit of unique experiences, common good, and camaraderie.
Circa 2021
Long after horse-drawn beer carriages and refrigerated railcars, Round Trip Brewing began making high-quality, German-inspired beer for the citizens of Atlanta and beyond. Our beer comes in all styles, but our passion is to elevate traditional German styles beyond expectation. Join us on our journey to celebrate great beer and great friends who come from all over.
Pack your bags because you’re coming with us on an adventure. We’ll bring the beer.
Our Beer

Craig Mycoskie, CEO & Head Brewer
Craig Mycoskie is an award-winning brewer who has been brewing professionally since 2007 in Denver, Fort Worth, Austin, and now Atlanta. He attended the International Brewing Diploma program at the Siebel Institute of Technology based in Chicago and Munich, which affirmed his passion for German craft brewing. Craig worked as Head Brewer and V.P. of Operations at Rahr & Sons Brewing Company in Fort Worth and Celis Brewing in Austin. There, Craig led the brewing team to two gold medals, a silver medal, and a bronze medal at the Great American Beer Festival.
